name: How should I compare different AI search optimization vendors before choosing one?
description: Compare vendors by their methodology: do they lead with a multi‑platform audit, have a clear schema/content/citation strategy, and offer transparent measurement

mainEntity.name: How should I compare different AI search optimization vendors before choosing one?

acceptedAnswer.text:
When multiple AI search optimization vendors are pitching you, compare them on their approach to audits, measurement, and long‑term capability building—not just tool access or buzzwords. You want a partner who can transfer knowledge, not create dependency.

Good vendors focus on process and outcomes instead of promising shortcuts to “AI dominance.”

Key factors:
- Do they start with a multi‑platform visibility audit and clear baselines?
- Can they explain their schema, content, and citation strategy in plain language?
- How will they measure success beyond vanity metrics?
- Are they willing to document processes so your team can maintain gains?

Practically, ask for sample audit reports, a 90‑day plan, and concrete case examples that resemble your size and locations (e.g., multi‑city operations like Austin, Denver, Salt Lake City).

Choosing a vendor with a structured, teachable methodology will give you durable advantages beyond the engagement itself.
acceptedAnswer.description: Compare vendors by their methodology: do they lead with a multi‑platform audit, have a clear schema/content/citation strategy, and offer transparent measurement and process documentation? Favor partners who can teach your team and build durable capabilities, not just run tools for you.
